reasons.title: Open-source and free
reasons.description: No subscription, no ads. The code is free and will remain so.

reasons.title: Hosting and infrastructure
reasons.description: Servers, SSL certificates and email delivery have a real cost.

reasons.title: Ongoing maintenance
reasons.description: Security updates, bug fixes and compatibility with new releases.

reasons.title: New features
reasons.description: Every contribution accelerates the development of community-requested features.

en.ctaDescription: Donations are handled through GitHub Sponsors. You can make a one-time donation or set up recurring support.
en.ctaNote: You will be redirected to GitHub Sponsors in a new tab.
en.thanksDescription: Every contribution, however small, makes a difference. Thank you for believing in this project.

reasons.title: Open-source et gratuit
reasons.description: Pas d'abonnement, pas de publicité. Le code est libre et le restera.

reasons.title: Hébergement et infrastructure
reasons.description: Les serveurs, les certificats SSL et la livraison des emails ont un coût réel.

reasons.title: Maintenance continue
reasons.description: Mises à jour de sécurité, corrections de bugs et compatibilité avec les nouvelles versions.

reasons.title: Nouvelles fonctionnalités
reasons.description: Chaque contribution accélère le développement de fonctionnalités demandées par la communauté.

fr.ctaDescription: Les dons sont gérés via GitHub Sponsors. Vous pouvez faire un don ponctuel ou mettre en place un soutien récurrent.
fr.ctaNote: Vous serez redirigé vers GitHub Sponsors dans un nouvel onglet.
fr.thanksDescription: Chaque contribution, même modeste, fait la différence. Merci de croire en ce projet.

reasons.title: Open-source en gratis
reasons.description: Geen abonnement, geen advertenties. De code is vrij en blijft dat.

reasons.title: Hosting en infrastructuur
reasons.description: Servers, SSL-certificaten en e-mailbezorging brengen reele kosten mee.

reasons.title: Doorlopend onderhoud
reasons.description: Beveiligingsupdates, bugfixes en compatibiliteit met nieuwe versies.

reasons.title: Nieuwe functies
reasons.description: Elke bijdrage versnelt de ontwikkeling van door de community gevraagde functies.

nl.ctaDescription: Donaties worden beheerd via GitHub Sponsors. U kunt eenmalig doneren of terugkerende steun instellen.
nl.ctaNote: U wordt doorgestuurd naar GitHub Sponsors in een nieuw tabblad.
nl.thanksDescription: Elke bijdrage, hoe klein ook, maakt een verschil. Bedankt voor uw vertrouwen in dit project.

reasons.title: Open-source e gratuito
reasons.description: Nessun abbonamento, nessuna pubblicita. Il codice e libero e lo restera.

reasons.title: Hosting e infrastruttura
reasons.description: Server, certificati SSL e consegna email hanno un costo reale.

reasons.title: Manutenzione continua
reasons.description: Aggiornamenti di sicurezza, correzioni di bug e compatibilita con le nuove versioni.

reasons.title: Nuove funzionalita
reasons.description: Ogni contributo accelera lo sviluppo delle funzionalita richieste dalla community.

it.ctaDescription: Le donazioni sono gestite tramite GitHub Sponsors. Puoi fare una donazione una tantum o impostare un supporto ricorrente.
it.ctaNote: Verrai reindirizzato a GitHub Sponsors in una nuova scheda.
it.thanksDescription: Ogni contributo, anche piccolo, fa la differenza. Grazie per credere in questo progetto.

reasons.title: Open-source y gratuito
reasons.description: Sin suscripcion, sin publicidad. El codigo es libre y lo seguira siendo.

reasons.title: Alojamiento e infraestructura
reasons.description: Los servidores, certificados SSL y el envio de emails tienen un coste real.

reasons.title: Mantenimiento continuo
reasons.description: Actualizaciones de seguridad, correccion de errores y compatibilidad con nuevas versiones.

reasons.title: Nuevas funcionalidades
reasons.description: Cada contribucion acelera el desarrollo de funcionalidades solicitadas por la comunidad.

es.ctaDescription: Las donaciones se gestionan a traves de GitHub Sponsors. Puedes hacer una donacion puntual o configurar un apoyo recurrente.
es.ctaNote: Seras redirigido a GitHub Sponsors en una nueva pestana.
es.thanksDescription: Cada contribucion, por pequena que sea, marca la diferencia. Gracias por creer en este proyecto.
